item.title: Claude vs ChatGPT Comparison 2025 — Which AI Assistant Actually Wins?
item.description: We tested Claude Sonnet 4 vs ChatGPT GPT-4o on 5 real tasks with real user stories.

item.description: Cursor, Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Gamma, NotebookLM — real stories from real users.

item.title: 5 Free AI Tools Good Enough to Replace Paid Subscriptions
item.description: Save $1,260/year with these 5 free alternatives to expensive AI subscriptions.

item.title: Cursor Deep Dive — Is AI-Assisted Coding Worth It?
item.description: Two weeks of real testing: tab completion, refactoring, codebase Q&A. Honest review.

item.title: Welcome to AI Pickz — Your Honest Guide to AI Tools
item.description: We're building the most honest, hands-on AI tool review site on the web.
